The '''''Moonshadow''''' was a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] used by [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] and [[Con artist/Legends|con artist]] [[Rik Duel/Legends|Rik Duel]].
